# Ajay Renjith - Full Stack Developer & Backend Architect

A professional full-stack software engineer specializing in scaling backend architectures, Django REST Framework, React/Next.js frontend systems, and secure VPS hosting environments.

## Information & Links
* **Full Name**: Ajay Renjith
* **Title**: Senior Full Stack Developer | Django & React Specialist | Backend Architect
* **Live Portfolio**: https://portfolio-tau-dusky-45.vercel.app
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/ajaycodesx

* **Location**: Kerala, India

---

## Technical Stack & Competencies

### Backend Engineering
* **Languages**: Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, SQL
* **Frameworks**: Django, Django REST Framework, Python FastAPI, Node.js
* **Database**: PostgreSQL, SQLite, MySQL, Database Architectures & Design
* **Integrations**: RESTful APIs, Secure Authentication Gateways, Stripe/Payment Gates, AI/ML Integrations

### Frontend Engineering
* **Core**: TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3
* **Frameworks**: React.js, Next.js (App Router, Turbopack), Vue.js, Tailwind CSS
* **Aesthetics**: Glassmorphism, 3D WebGL (Three.js, React Three Fiber), Framer Motion, Responsive Grid Layouts

### DevOps, Deployment & Infrastructure
* **Operating Systems**: Ubuntu / Linux Server Administration
* **Containerization**: Docker, Docker Compose
* **Web Servers**: Nginx, Gunicorn, Reverse Proxies
* **Control Panels**: CyberPanel, AAPanel
* **CI/CD**: Automation Pipelines, GitHub Actions
* **Hosting**: Virtual Private Servers (VPS), Vercel

---

## Professional Journey

### Lead Developer at MarketBytes (2024 - Present)
* Leading full-stack development for multiple production-grade web applications, B2B SaaS portals, and invoicing utilities.
* Architected scalable backend architectures with Django REST Framework.
* Programmed responsive, high-performance dashboards using React/Next.js.
* Managed complete deployment workflows on Ubuntu VPS platforms using Nginx, Gunicorn, Docker, CyberPanel, and AAPanel.

### Senior Full Stack Developer at PixelBoho (8 Months)
* Engineered full-stack web applications and custom CRM/CMS portals.
* Focused on UI/UX optimization, responsive design stacks, and frontend performance indices.
* Configured backend endpoints, API authentication gateways, and local-to-cloud deployments.

### Junior Full Stack Developer at Ezer Developers (4 Months)
* Developed clean landing pages and client-side modules using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.
* Assisted senior engineers in React component architecture and local test executions.
* Learned REST APIs, command line git, and local production pipelines.

---

## Featured Projects

### 1. B2B SaaS Marketplace & CRM
* High-scale SaaS marketplace integrated with dynamic pricing, quotation engines, and customer management portals.
* **Stack**: Next.js, React.js, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, Docker, AAPanel.

### 2. Custom Business CMS & Invoicing System
* Advanced business administration utility with secure invoice generation, PDF reporting, role-based controls, and client databases.
* **Stack**: React, Django, PostgreSQL, VPS Hosting, CyberPanel.

### 3. Smart Email Marketing & Automation Hub
* Automation system for managing concurrent email queues, custom campaign schedules, template parsing, and delivery analytics.
* **Stack**: Python, FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Docker Compose, Redis, Celery.
